ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the vehicle */,
  "km_driven" INTEGER /* Total kilometers driven */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., Individual, Dealer) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Ownership status (e.g., First Owner, Second Owner) */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "engine" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in CC */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power output */,
  "torque" TEXT /* Torque output specification */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Vehicle color */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "additional_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Vehicle make */,
  "model" TEXT /* Vehicle model */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Vehicle generation */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the vehicle */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity of the vehicle */,
  "emission_norm" TEXT /* Emission norm of the vehicle */,
  "emission_rating" TEXT /* Emission rating of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_seller_type FOREIGN KEY ("seller_type") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (Individual or Dealer) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration on the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Seller's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Seller's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Seller's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Seller's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Seller's zip code */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Business name of the seller */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the buyer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration on the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Buyer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Buyer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Buyer's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Buyer's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Buyer's zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer involved in the transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being purchased */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the vehicle */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the vehicle (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the buyer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the specifications */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in CC */,
  "power" REAL /* Maximum power output */,
  "torque" TEXT /* Torque output specification */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension used in the vehicle */,
  "brake_type" TEXT /* Type of brake used in the vehicle */,
  "wheelbase" REAL /* Wheelbase of the vehicle */,
  "ground_clearance" REAL /* Ground clearance of the vehicle */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_specifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller review */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the seller (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the buyer about the seller */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_reviews_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the message */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was sent */,
  "message_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the favorite vehicle */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle marked as favorite */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was marked as favorite */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (e.g., vehicle, seller) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)
